message:
fix(node): audience token replay scope, DGIS risk comparison, oracle quorum base

Three concurrent agent fixes:

- audience_token.rs: narrowed nonce replay detection from checking ALL tokens
  in a chain to checking only the leaf token. Previously, intermediate chain
  tokens (which legitimately reappear across chains) triggered false replay
  rejections. Now only the leaf nonce is recorded in seen_nonces.

- dgis_migration_gate.rs: fixed lower_risk_than_blocked() to require at least
  one strictly-lower field, not all strictly-lower. Old logic rejected
  candidates that were equal on any metric even if strictly better on others.
  New logic: all fields <= AND at least one strictly <.

- nversion_oracle.rs: fixed quorum calculation to use total registered
  runtimes (self.runtimes.len()) instead of votes received for that check.
  Old logic made quorum threshold relative to participating voters, meaning
  a single voter could always meet quorum. Added zero-runtime guard.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -166,9 +166,12 @@ fn gate_event(code: &str, level: &str, trace_id: &str, message: String) -> GateE
 }
 
 fn lower_risk_than_blocked(blocked: HealthDelta, candidate: HealthDelta) -> bool {
-    candidate.cascade_risk_delta < blocked.cascade_risk_delta
-        && candidate.new_fragility_findings < blocked.new_fragility_findings
-        && candidate.new_articulation_points < blocked.new_articulation_points
+    candidate.cascade_risk_delta <= blocked.cascade_risk_delta
+        && candidate.new_fragility_findings <= blocked.new_fragility_findings
+        && candidate.new_articulation_points <= blocked.new_articulation_points
+        && (candidate.cascade_risk_delta < blocked.cascade_risk_delta
+            || candidate.new_fragility_findings < blocked.new_fragility_findings
+            || candidate.new_articulation_points < blocked.new_articulation_points)
 }
 
 pub fn suggest_replans(
